content.en:
"Elder Ye Tian also signed up?"

Soho was shocked.

She admitted that Ye Tian's strength was stronger than her, and after breaking through to become a patriarch, his strength was very strong, but the first thirty-six patriarchs were far from being comparable to ordinary patriarchs, and their strength was extremely terrifying.

Ye Tian's strength is still far from the top thirty-six elders, right?

Not only Soho, but many elders were shocked and looked at Ye Tian one after another.

But every patriarch had the right to sign up, so they didn't say anything.

Eventually, six veterans applied for the challenge.

"Elder Lihuo, which Elder do you want to challenge?"

The First Elder asked.

Elder Lihuo said respectfully: "First Patriarch, I want to challenge Patriarch Jin Xuan, Thirty-sixth Patriarch!"

"Elder Jin Xuan is not here at the moment, if you want to challenge him, I need to inform him, it will probably take a while before he can come back. The First Patriarch said.

This is not that the 36th patriarch is deliberately avoiding the challenge, but that there is something important and he will not be able to return for a while.

He won't come back unless someone challenges him.

"Then I'll challenge the thirty-fifth patriarch - Shadow Geng patriarch!"

Leave the fire patriarch.

"Yes!"

The First Patriarch agreed.

Wow!

Elder Ying Geng stepped out and accepted the challenge of the Elder of the Flame.

"Let's go to the Void Realm to fight!"

The First Elder Road.

Immediately.

Elder Shadow Geng and Elder Away from Fire walked into the Void Realm, and the First Elder drew an area for them to fight in this area.

......

Rumble!!!!!

The Elder of the Fire broke out of the cultivation of the late stage of the Mythical Dao Realm, the second sequence to the realm of ninety percent of the Dao rules, and he also took the road of the strongest to the Dao, completed seven transformations, and his strength was extremely strong.

And the Shadow Geng Patriarch is also very powerful, and his cultivation has reached the peak of the Mythical Dao Realm, comprehended the second sequence of the Dao Rules, and completed the Mythical Body and completed the eight transformations.

It's just that Elder Ying Geng didn't take the path of the strongest to the Dao, but he also refined the legendary spiritual object, and his foundation became very strong, second only to the path of the strongest to the Dao.

So, his strength may be a little stronger.

Thundered!!!

The two sides fought, which made the other elders extremely enjoyable.

The strength of the Fire Elder is very close to the Shadow Geng Patriarch, otherwise he would not choose to challenge.

However, the strength of the Fire Elder eventually weakened and fell into disadvantage.

But at this moment.

The aura of an innate primordial treasure appeared on the body of the Elder of the Leaving Fire, and his various attack methods suddenly swelled up, and began to crush the Elder of Shadow Geng.

"I also have an innate primordial treasure that can improve combat effectiveness!"

A gun appeared in the hand of the Shadow Geng Elder, and it was also an innate original treasure.

Holding this spear, Elder Ying Geng's strength skyrocketed, crushing the Elder Lihuo again.

In another battle, the Elder Lihuo was wounded, and the injuries were not light.

"Throw in the towel!"

Leave the fire patriarch.

There is no point in continuing to play, he has all the cards in his holes, he still can't play, and if he continues to play, he will only let himself die frequently, and he will have to be rescued by the first patriarch, so there is no point.

Seeing the strength of the Shadow Geng Elder, the other Elders were not ready to challenge him, and some Elders began to challenge the Thirty-Fourth Patriarch.

The strength of the elders after the thirty cannot be divided according to the ranking, and it is possible that the thirty-fifth elder is stronger than the thirty-fourth elder.

The thirty-fourth patriarch is the elder of the sword ancient and the patriarch of the knife clan.

I saw that the strength of the Dao Gu Patriarch was no less than that of the Shadow Geng Patriarch, and the other Patriarchs still failed to challenge.

One veteran failed to challenge, and the other patriarchs were not surprised at all.

After all, once you become the top thirty-six veterans, you will get a lot of resources and benefits, and your strength will definitely be even stronger, and it will be extremely difficult for later elders to enter the top thirty-six.

Unless the first thirty-six patriarchs fall, the latecomers will be given a chance.

But in this period, there is no fall of the first thirty-six patriarchs, and they don't think that any patriarch can squeeze into the top thirty-six.

"Elder Ye Tian, which elder are you going to challenge?"

The First Patriarch's gaze passed.

The other elders also looked at it, and they didn't think that Ye Tian had any hope of succeeding in the challenge, but they were hopeful that they were curious about Ye Tian's strength.

After all, Ye Tian is now a legend in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and his strength has improved too fast!

The key is that Ye Tian not only became a patriarch himself, but also cultivated his three family members to become patriarchs together, which is very powerful!

"I'm going to challenge Elder Shadow Geng!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, let's get started!"

The First Elder Road.

......

In the void.

Ye Tian and Elder Ying Geng appeared here, and the two sides directly began to fight.

Rumble!!!!!

A variety of supreme mythical bodies appeared on Ye Tian's body, and eighteen supreme mythical bodies burst out, and all of them completed the third transformation, this scene shocked the other elders, and also shocked the Ying Geng elders.

"Eighteen kinds of supreme legend body, which is equivalent to consuming eighteen kinds of supreme legend blood, where did Elder Ye Tian get so much supreme power legend blood???

These patriarchs were puzzled.

Moreover, how many resources it would cost to complete the three transformations of the eighteen supreme mythical bodies was an astronomical amount!

The first patriarch was also a little surprised, he thought that Ye Tian was just trying, but he didn't expect that he really had the strength to compete for the top thirty-six patriarchs.

"Ye Tian should have obtained an innate primordial treasure that would help improve the body of the myth, otherwise it would be impossible to improve so quickly in a short period of time!"

The first patriarch guessed.

The Innate Primordial Treasure had all kinds of abilities, and he even suspected that Ye Tian's clone ability was a kind of Innate Primordial Treasure ability.

In fact, many elders also had some guesses, but it was not good to snatch Ye Tian's chance.

"Eighteen supreme mythical bodies, three transformations, it is indeed very demonic, but unfortunately this strength is still not enough!"

Shadow Geng Elder said.

"Really?"

The first sequence of Dao rules appeared on Ye Tian's body, and he reached the realm of consummation, and the terrifying aura erupted, making the face of the Ying Geng elders change.

He thinks he might lose this time!

You can't hide your strength, you have to break out in all of them.

Rumble!!!

The aura of three innate primordial treasures appeared on the body of the Shadow Geng Elder, all of which helped to improve his strength.

He's going to give it his all.

And Ye Tian was the same, the eye of identification urged, and the statue of Mi Luo merged into the body, bursting out with more powerful combat power.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian fought with Shadow Geng Patriarch, and at the beginning, Ye Tian had the advantage and knocked Shadow Geng Elder away with one blow.

Seeing this scene, the other patriarchs were surprised.
